title: Company name not loading from XANO
symptom: The company name is not displayed on the front-end even though it is received from the backend. This results in incomplete data being shown to the user.
not_this_if: Data is correctly displayed in other components
No data is received from the backend
root_cause: The issue arises when the data returned from the backend has a naming convention that includes an underscore prefix, which may not match the expected binding in the front-end, leading to undefined values being displayed.
fix_steps: Check the data structure returned from XANO for the 'company' field
Ensure that the binding in the front-end matches the exact naming convention used in the backend
Remove any unnecessary prefixes in the backend if applicable
agent_instruction: Verify the naming convention of the 'company' field in the backend and adjust the front-end binding accordingly.
